theme.sectionDescription: Mix and match light and dark theme families.

appearance.label: Appearance
appearance.description: Follow your system or lock Glyph to light or dark mode.

system.label: System
system.description: Match your device light or dark appearance.

accent.sectionDescription: Applies to the Glyph light and dark themes.

palette.label: Palette
palette.description: Sets the accent for highlights, focus rings, and emphasis.

preset.label: Preset
preset.hint: Pick the palette Glyph uses in light mode.

preset.label: Preset
preset.hint: Pick the palette Glyph uses in dark mode.

shape.sectionDescription: Choose how rounded panels, buttons, and windows look across the app.

corners.label: Corners
corners.description: Applies everywhere — sidebars, dialogs, inputs, and cards.

sharp.label: Brutalist
sharp.description: Crisp, square edges throughout the app.

round.label: Soft
round.description: Gentler, more rounded edges throughout the app.

typography.sectionDescription: Tune interface type, code styling, and reading scale independently.

interfaceFont.label: Interface font
interfaceFont.description: Used for navigation, settings, and most UI copy across Glyph.

editorFont.label: Editor font
editorFont.description: Used for regular note text outside inline code and code blocks.

monospaceFont.label: Monospace font
monospaceFont.description: Used for markdown source, inline code, and developer-oriented surfaces.

uiFontSize.label: UI font size
uiFontSize.description: Adjust the base size used by menus, panes, controls, and settings.

editorFontSize.label: Editor font size
editorFontSize.description: Adjust the reading size for the note editor, markdown preview, and raw text editing.

layout.sectionDescription: Choose how Glyph presents your workspace and All Notes.

folioMode.label: Folio Mode
folioMode.description: Show navigation, notes, and editor in a three-column workspace.

classicAllNotes.label: Classic All Notes grid
classicAllNotes.description: Open All Notes as the simple grid instead of the activity timeline.

editorPresentation.sectionDescription: Choose how notes look while you edit them.

beautifulTags.label: Beautiful Tags
beautifulTags.description: Enable the experimental Beautiful Tags presentation for tags.

editorWidth.label: Editor width
editorWidth.description: Compact keeps lines shorter, Comfortable gives a little bit more room, and Wide uses the full editor width.

database.sectionDescription: Choose how databases are presented across Glyph.

showColumnColor.label: Show database column color
showColumnColor.description: Keep the lane pill and tag colors while toggling the full column tint.
